title: anthonotha elongata
intro: Anthonotha elongata, also known as the African bush mango, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and West Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Anthonotha elongata include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation. The herbal preparations of Anthonotha elongata include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable resource in traditional African medicine.
